subject: Subscription Create Response Handling Cps Part
commit_message:
Subscription Create Response Handling Cps Part

- Configured all kafka topics.
- Introduced suscription response consumer.
- Added subscription event outcome to publish to the
  specified topic.
- dos2unix for application.yml

Issue-ID: CPS-1492
Change-Id: I1ad3415ee116e82f3af091358e8beb847daaa9c7
Signed-off-by: halil.cakal <halil.cakal@est.tech>
